summary: Completed frontend testing of NASSAQ Platform Admin Dashboard improvements - Iteration 17. All 7 requested features tested and PASSED: 1) Login as Platform Admin ✓, 2) Welcome Card with user name + semester + dates ✓, 3) Cascading Filters (Region -> City) ✓, 4) PDF Export with jsPDF ✓, 5) Sparkline Charts ✓, 6) Quick Actions ✓, 7) Card Click Navigation ✓

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library warning, does not affect functionality. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer.

passed_tests: 1. تسجيل الدخول كمدير منصة (Platform Admin Login) - ✓ PASS - Email: info@nassaqapp.com works correctly
- Selecting 'المنطقة الغربية' (Western Region) updates city dropdown
- City dropdown shows only Western cities: جدة، مكة، المدينة، الطائف، ينبع
- Data changes based on filter: 210 schools -> 3 schools (Western Region)
- Export button shows dropdown with PDF and Excel options
- Clicking 'تنزيل PDF' downloads actual PDF file: nassaq_report_2026-03-09.pdf
- Success toast 'تم تنزيل ملف PDF بنجاح' displayed
- Found 8 area chart elements (sparklines with gradient fill)
- Colored bar indicator on left side (green for up, red for down)
- Settings icon appears on card hover
- Dropdown shows: عرض التفاصيل (View Details), فتح التقرير (Open Report), ضبط تنبيه (Set Alert)
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions - consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer to suppress warnings
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dashboard improvements tested successfully. Welcome card shows user name, semester info, and dual dates. Cascading filters work: Region -> City dropdown updates dynamically. PDF export generates real PDF file using jsPDF. Sparkline charts visible with gradient fill and trend indicators. Quick actions dropdown works on card hover. Cards are clickable and navigate to detail pages.

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from real MongoDB database. Backend API /api/dashboard/stats supports region and city filter parameters.

pdf_export.generates: Real PDF file using jsPDF library

sparkline_charts.trend_indicator: Colored bar on left (green=up, red=down, gray=stable)
